hero.title: Create Your Moment
hero.subtitle: Bookable is a boutique event planning, production, booking & experiential marketing agency with a focus on live entertainment.

features.title: LIVE MUSIC BOOKING/PROGRAMMING
features.description: We help you find and book the perfect artist, band, DJ or MC for your events.

features.title: EVENT PLANNING
features.description: We help you plan, design and manage your event from start to finish.

features.title: EVENT PRODUCTION
features.description: We provide event production services, including full A/V, sound and lighting equipment, staging, and event staffing.

secondarySection.title: Our Clients
secondarySection.description: We’re proud to have worked and partnered with some of the following brands…

footer: Let us help you plan and find the best entertainment for your next event!
